title: Spicy Spinach Medley
description: A festive Mediterranean dish featuring spinach cooked slowly with spices for a spicy and dense medley that's vegetarian-friendly.

ingredients.name: Salt and black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onions and sauté until translucent, about 4 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for another minute until fragrant but not browned.
Stir in red bell pepper and cumin, cooking for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Toss in spinach and continue to cook until the leaves wilt slightly, about 5 minutes.
Sprinkle with smoked paprika, salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper. Stir well to combine all ingredients evenly.
Transfer mixture to a baking dish, drizzle with lemon juice, and bake for about 20-30 minutes or until the spinach is tender and slightly caramelized on top.
Serve warm as a side dish or over rice.
